name: Billtrust
description: Billtrust — Order-to-cash platform processing $1T+ annually in invoice value for mid-market and enterprise

seo.title: Billtrust — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Billtrust: Billtrust — Order-to-cash platform processing $1T+ annually in invoice value for mid-market and enterprise

when_to_use: Order-to-cash automation for mid-market and enterprise AR teams
Electronic invoice presentment and payment for B2B customers
Cash application automation reducing manual reconciliation overhead
AR workflow integration with SAP, Oracle, and NetSuite ERPs

pros: Handles $1T+ invoice volume annually — proven scale
Deep O2C coverage: invoicing, payments, cash app
cons: Enterprise pricing — not for sub-$50M revenue
Legacy modules feel fragmented after acquisitions
API is available but documentation is gated
review.verdict: Heavyweight order-to-cash platform for mid-market/enterprise — powerful but slow to stand up.
review.best_for: B2B enterprises with complex invoicing and cash application across many customer accounts.
review.not_for: Fast-moving SMBs that need self-serve tooling and quick time-to-value.
